title: Smoky Wilted Moroccan Green Beans Tagine
description: A hearty, smoky Moroccan dish featuring wilted green beans, rich in flavors and spices. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Amlou (Almond and Honey Paste)
ingredients.notes: You can substitute with 1 tablespoon of honey and 1 tablespoon of chopped almonds.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in an iron teppan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the chopped green beans and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in cumin, coriander, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for another 2 minutes, until the green beans are slightly wilted.
Stir in the amlou paste and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
